_source: Google SRE Workbook Ch.5 detection-time formula t = w * BR* / BR_actual for the recommended 1h/BR*14.4 and 6h/BR*6 tiers. Results in hours.

cases.description: 1h window, BR* 14.4, actual exactly at threshold -> full window 1h
1h window, BR* 14.4, actual 100 -> detect in 0.144h ~= 8.64 min
1h window, BR* 14.4, actual 1000 (total outage) -> detect in 0.0144h ~= 51.84s
6h window, BR* 6, actual exactly at threshold -> full window 6h
